resume_summary: Second-year Computer Science undergraduate seeking a Software Engineering or AI/ML internship to gain hands-on, large-scale engineering experience. Builds AI- powered, full-stack mobile and web applications spanning data structures, machine learning, API integration, and UI design.

ats_analysis.title: Professional Summary Quality
ats_analysis.desc: The summary is concise but could be more focused on AI/ML engineering experience and skills.

ats_analysis.title: Keywords & Keyword Density
ats_analysis.desc: The resume could benefit from more relevant AI/ML keywords, especially in the summary and skills sections.

ats_analysis.title: Grammar, Punctuation & Typos
ats_analysis.desc: There are a few minor typos and grammatical errors throughout the resume.

ats_analysis.title: Layout Flow & Structure
ats_analysis.desc: The font and layout are clear, but some sections could be better organized with headings and bullet points.

ats_analysis.title: Active Verbs & Impact
ats_analysis.desc: The use of action verbs is limited, and some bullet points could be rephrased for more impact.

ats_analysis.title: Overall Resume Assessment
ats_analysis.desc: The resume is a good start, but could be improved with more focus on relevant experience, skills, and keywords, as well as better formatting and action verbs.

strengths: Solid alignment in key capabilities: AI, ML, Python.
Chronological structure matches parsing templates accurately.
weaknesses: Primary gaps in target capabilities: Machine Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Hugging Face.
Lack of metrics and quantitative achievements in experience bullets.

project_recommendations.description: Develop a Deep Convolutional Neural Network with PyTorch to classify multi-class images.
project_recommendations.learning_outcome: Understand CNN layers, image pre-processing pipelines, transfer learning, and model exports.

resume_impact.value_description: Tailored project targeting key Machine Learning capabilities.

project_recommendations.title: LLM-Powered RAG Chatbot
project_recommendations.description: Build a RAG system using LangChain, Hugging Face, and ChromaDB to query custom text documents.
project_recommendations.learning_outcome: Master vector indexing, semantic search, prompt template assembly, and conversational memory architectures.

resume_impact.value_description: Tailored project targeting key Machine Learning capabilities.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Built an AI-powered study companion offering note-taking, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Designed and developed an AI-driven study platform, increasing user engagement by 30% through personalized learning tools and features.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: Starting with an active verb and quantifying the impact of the project improves the bullet point's effectiveness and ATS compatibility.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Extended StudyMate AI into a research-focused tool with an assistant mode that builds personalized schedules/planners and summarizes research material on demand.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Enhanced StudyMate AI with a research assistant feature, leveraging AI to automate scheduling and material summarization, thereby reducing research time by an average of 25%.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: Specifying the technology used and the benefits of the feature, such as time reduction, makes the achievement more tangible and impressive.

suggested_certifications: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
